name: HRG_GOAL_ACTIONS_
description: Stores the details of Goal Tasks (Intially termed as 'Actions').

columns.Name: GOAL_ACTION_ID
columns.Comments: The system generated surrogate key for this entry.

columns.Name: MIN_TARGET
columns.Comments: Minimum Target for Measurable task

columns.Name: TARGET_PERCENTAGE
columns.Comments: Target Percentage for Measurable Task

columns.Name: MAX_TARGET
columns.Comments: Maximum target for Measurable Task

columns.Name: ACHIEVED_WEIGHT
columns.Comments: Achieved Weight of Measurable task

columns.Name: ACTUAL_VALUE
columns.Comments: Actual value of Measurable Task

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Description of Goal Action

columns.Name: ACTUAL_COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Actual Completion Date of Goal Action

columns.Name: COMPLETION_STATUS
columns.Comments: Current Status of the Goal Action

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_BUSINESS_GROUPS

columns.Name: GOAL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRG_GOALS, which represents the goal for which action is created.

columns.Name: ACTION_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the goal action

columns.Name: ACTION_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Type of goal action

columns.Name: PRIORITY_CODE
columns.Comments: Priority of goal action. Possible values are High, Medium and Low.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Start date of goal action

columns.Name: TARGET_COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: Target date to achieve goal action.

columns.Name: PERCENT_COMPLETE_CODE
columns.Comments: Action percent complete code

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Status of action. Possible values are Not Started, In Progress, Completed, Overdue, Incomplete.

columns.Name: ACTION_URL
columns.Comments: URL to lunch a page related to action.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: To capture comments for tasks progress

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: UOM_CODE
columns.Comments: UOM code for measurable action.

columns.Name: TARGET_TYPE
columns.Comments: Target type for measurable action.

columns.Name: TARGET_VALUE
columns.Comments: Target value for measurable action.

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
